mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT register_id) AS prescription_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = '发放' THEN -quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS dispensed_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = '发放' THEN -total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS dispensed_amount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = '入库' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END), 0) AS inbound_quantity, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = '退回' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS returned_amount FROM pharmacy_transaction
transaction_time >= #{startDate} AND transaction_time <= #{endDate}

SELECT drug_id AS "drugId", drug_name AS "drugName", SUM(-quantity) AS "dispensedQuantity", COUNT(*) AS "dispenseTimes" FROM pharmacy_transaction WHERE type = '发放' AND transaction_time >= #{startDate} AND transaction_time <= #{endDate} GROUP BY drug_id, drug_name ORDER BY "dispensedQuantity" DESC LIMIT #{limit}
